name: order_lookup
description: Look up order details from DynamoDB. Retrieves orders for a specific customer, or a specific order if both customer_id and product_id are provided. Returns order information including purchase date and status.

product_id.description: Optional: The unique product identifier (e.g., P-001). If provided with customer_id, returns a specific order.

name: user_lookup
description: Retrieve customer information from DynamoDB. Returns customer details including name and country code.

name: product_lookup
description: Retrieve product information from DynamoDB. Returns product details including name, provider, and category.
